results.title: Senior Auditor Data Analytics - GSC - US | Hirequorum
highlights:
Senior Auditor Data Analytics - GSC - US | Hirequorum
...
# Senior Auditor Data Analytics - GSC - US
...
Job Summary:
...
The Senior Auditor – Data Analytics serves as a member of the Internal Audit Center of Excellence, helping shape how data analytics, automation, and emerging technologies are used across audit and SOX activities. The role partners closely with auditors, leadership, and the business to design scalable, data-driven approaches that improve audit quality, efficiency, and insight. This person will also play a crucial role in ensuring consistency, standardization, and ongoing improvement throughout our audit teams.
...
- Be part of our Center of Excellence, focused on supporting data driven audits by leveraging data analytics, automation and generative AI.
- Foster and develop relationships across the audit team and business stakeholders to understand processes, risks, systems and data availability.
...
- Design, build, and scale analytics, automation, and Generative AI use cases that support audit planning, execution, and reporting.
...
Education and Experience:
...
- Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, data analytics, computer science, statistics, business or a related field are required.
- MBA, Master’s in Business Analytics or other advanced degree is preferred.
- 4+ years’ experience in internal audit, external audit, data analytics or business intelligence are required.
- Experience with Alteryx and data visualization tools such as PowerBI or Tableau is required.
- Experience in audit analytics and a data‑focused Center of Excellence, including developing methodologies to quantify financial exposure, savings, or value realization related to audit risks and observations is strongly preferred.
...
- Experience with Python, SQL, and comfort with ERP systems is preferred.
...
- Experience designing, building, or deploying AI agents or agent‑based solutions to support business, audit, or analytics use cases is preferred.

results.title: Senior Auditor Data Analytics - GSC - US | Joblume
highlights: co Resources Services, LLC Sales Territory: None Zip Code: 77077 Travel Percentage: Up to 25% Compensation Range: $94,600.00 - $142,000.00 The compensation range provided is in compliance with state specific laws. Factors that may be used to determine your actual rate of pay include your specific skills, years of experience and other factors. You may be eligible to participate in the Company's Incentive Plan. BENEFITS INFORMATION: For information on Sysco’s Benefits, please visit https://SyscoBenefits.com Job Summary: The Senior Auditor – Data Analytics serves as a member of the Internal Audit Center of Excellence, helping shape how data analytics, automation, and emerging technologies are used across audit and SOX activities. The role partners closely with auditors, leadership, and the business to design scalable, data-driven approaches that improve audit quality, efficiency, and insight. This person will also play a crucial role in ensuring consistency, standardization, and ongoing improvement throughout our audit teams. What you’ll do: Be part of our Center of Excellence, focused on supporting data driven audits by leveraging data analytics, automation and generative AI. Foster and develop relationships across the audit team and business stakeholders to understand processes, risks, systems and data availability. Design, build, and scale analytics, automation, and Generative AI use cases that support audit planning, execution, and reporting. Drive continuous improvement across all audit activities - modernizing the end‑to‑end audit lifecycle through standardized processes, documentation, reporting, and governance. Break down complex, ambiguous issues into clear, actionable insights Promote a data-focused and innovative mindset across the team that emphasizes quantifiable insights to support audit planning and procedures. Analyze unstructured and incomplete data to identify risks, inefficiencies, and improvement opportunities Willing to travel up to 15% of the time. Who you are: Possess a passion for results, operating with autonomy, and a genuine interest in streamlining our operations and improving SOX/audit efforts. Excellent problem-solving and continuous improvement mindset. You are skilled at communicating and influencing best practices across a multi‑level organization, helping teams adopt consistent, scalable analytics and audit processes Able to translate complex data insights into clear, actionable messages for non-technical audiences Education and Experience: Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, data analytics, computer science, statistics, business or a related field are required. MBA, Master’s in Business Analytics or other advanced degree is preferred. 4+ years’ experience in internal audit, external audit, data analytics or business intelligence are required. Experience with Alteryx and data visualization tools such as PowerBI or Tableau is required. Experience in audit analytics and a data‑focused Center of Excellence, including developing methodologies to quantify financial exposure, savings, or value realization related to audit risks and observations is strongly preferred. Experience with Python, SQL, and comfort with ERP systems is preferred. Experience designing, building, or deploying AI agents or agent‑based solutions to support business, audit, or analytics use cases is preferred. OVERVIEW: Sysco is the global leader in foodservice distribution. With over 71,000 colleagues and a fleet of over 13,000 vehicles, Sysco operates approximately 333 distribution facilities worldwide and serves more than 700,000 customer locations. We offer our colleagues the opportunity to grow personally and professionally, to contribute to the success of a dynamic organization, and to serve others in a manner that exceeds their expectations. We’re looking for talented, hard-working individuals to join our team. Come grow with us and let us show you why Sysco is at the heart of food and service.

results.title: Jonathan Black
highlights:
Principal Software Architect - AI, Product Discovery & Personalization at [Sysco](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sysco)
...
With over 15 years of expertise in software engineering and architecture, I currently serve as Principal Software Architect at Sysco, shaping the company's AI architecture. My role focuses on driving innovation in product discovery and personalization through generative AI and conversational tools. Recent contributions include establishing scalable standards for LLM deployment and delivering impactful AI initiatives, such as vector based search and a multi-tool chat agent. My professional mission centers on harnessing enterprise architecture and AI/ML strategy to create tailored, scalable solutions. I am passionate about enabling organizations to achieve operational efficiency and innovation whether that's through integrating advanced personalization platforms, modern data engineering practices or more ambitious modernizations of their digital estate. My work emphasizes flexibility, speed, and collaboration to empower businesses in their digital transformation journey whatever it may be.

results.title: Sysco AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Sysco Corporation, the world's largest foodservice distributor, has positioned AI as a central driver of its business transformation through multiple initiatives launched in 2025[1]. The company's AI360 platform is now used by approximately 90% of its sales consultants, helping reduce administrative tasks and improve customer engagement[2]. Sysco has been recognized with the Digital Transformation Award for embedding intelligence into every process through its SAGE enterprise AI ecosystem that integrates reusable agents, clean data, and cloud-agnostic infrastructure[3]. The company's comprehensive approach spans customer-facing applications like generative AI chatbots and menu optimization, to operational improvements in supply chain management, inventory forecasting, and warehouse automation[4]. CEO Kevin Hourican has emphasized that AI is fundamental to Sysco's 'Recipe for Growth' strategy, stating that '90% of sales consultants use the company's newly launched AI360 platform'[5].
...

...

...

...

...
### Tech vs Non-Tech AI Requirements
...
Tech Roles (Engineering/Data) 8.7%
...
Non-Tech Roles 2.8%
...
AI requirements are emerging but remain limited across Sysco's workforce. With only 3.8% of job postings mentioning AI, the company shows conservative AI adoption in hiring. Technical roles show higher AI expectations at 8.7%, while non-tech roles lag at 2.8%, suggesting AI capabilities are concentrated in specialized functions rather than distributed enterprise-wide.

results.title: Dean Duran
highlights:
Tech Lead Python & Agentic AI at [Sysco](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sysco)
...
I'm a Senior AI Engineer and Agentic Systems Architect specializing in production-grade AI agent design using Anthropic Claude and Model Context Protocol (MCP). Most recently, I architected and delivered the Service Registry AI Agent at Walmart (Fortune 1) — a standalone agent and A2A-integrated sub-agent within Walmart's enterprise Wibey multi-agent platform. The system enables natural language-driven service configuration management, replacing manual ticketing workflows entirely. Built with CrewAI, MCP servers, Milvus vector DB, and Human-in-the-Loop approval flows. I hold all four current Anthropic certifications: 🔹 Claude with Amazon Bedrock 🔹 Claude with Google Cloud Vertex AI 🔹 Model Context Protocol: Advanced Topics 🔹 Claude Code in Action My background spans Python engineering, RAG pipelines, LangGraph, multi-agent orchestration, and technical leadership. I've also led a startup team as Tech Lead (Homefoodie) and taught Python and software architecture at North American University and NuCamp Coding Bootcamp. I'm actively seeking Senior AI Engineer, AI Architect, or Staff Engineer roles where I can build the next generation of agentic systems. 📍 Katy, TX | Open to on-site, hybrid & remote 🔗 Always happy to connect with fellow builders.
...
### Tech Lead Python & Agentic AI at [Sysco](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sysco) (Current)
...
Leading Python and Agentic AI development on the SAGE (Sysco Agentic GenAI Ecosystem) platform. Designing Context as a Service architecture for multi-agent systems. Working with RAG pipelines, LLM orchestration, and Knowledge Graph integration using Neo4j
...
- Remote Client: Walmart Global Tech 🤖 Service Registry AI Agent — Architected and delivered a production AI agent operating both standalone and as an A2A-integrated sub-agent within Walmart's enterprise Wibey multi-agent platform. Built with CrewAI, MCP servers, Milvus vector DB, GraphQL live queries, and Human-in-the-Loop approval flows. 🛠️ Magic App — Designed and launched a React + GenAI powered UI framework used by 1,000+ developers, migrating complex DevOps Service Registry operations from manual CLI commands to a 1-click automated flow. 📊 Production Dashboard — Built a centralized infrastructure dashboard reducing critical log and link access from 15+ clicks to a single click, significantly improving MTTR during production incidents. ⚙️ DR & DevOps Automation — Contributed to Walmart's Disaster Recovery architecture; developed Python scripts automating complex YAML configuration generation for rapid environment replication. Client: Bank of America 🐍 Python Automation Framework — Refactored core Quartz-based automation framework, eliminating major code duplication and reducing script failure rates across enterprise testing workflows.
...
Honored to see Sysco recognized as a Newsweek 2026 AI Impact Award winner for AI Brand and Retail – Best Outcomes, Supply Chain Optimization. More importantly, it’s recognition of the incredible teams across Sysco turning #AI from ideas and pilots into real business outcomes every single day.

results.title: Elshaimaa Ali
highlights:
Sr. Manager Data Science
...
Sr. Manager Data Science at [Sysco](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sysco)
...
I'm interested in semantic web technologies with focus on building domain knowledge and creating semantic annotation. I'm passionate about interdisciplinary applications of Semantic Web technology, data analysis principles, and natural language processing algorithms. My main focus is, automating the creation of semantic models that explains entities and relations in the data of a given domain. The ultimate goal is building a domain knowledge base in the form of an interoperable ontology to be linked to other related data in different disciplines. Thus disclosing the isolated information in each domain and viewing it as part of the linked data cloud. My doctorate research involved building a framework for generating knowledge base for semantic annotations, which includes building a multi-layer annotation schema, creating semantic indices for documents, computing semantic relatedness. I graduated 2015 with a PhD in Computer Science at the University of Louisiana at Lafayette. My research interest includes but not limited to knowledge modeling, text analysis, information retrieval natural language processing and data mining.

My account has been quiet for a while, I've been cooking in the kitchen. I built an F1 Race Strategy Simulator powered by machine learning, and I'm genuinely proud of how it came together.
...
The overall idea: give anyone a pit wall engineer's view of race strategy. You pick a circuit, set your tire compounds and pit stop windows, and the simulator predicts your full race time lap by lap using an XGBoost model trained on real FastF1 telemetry data.
...
- Real telemetry pipeline: ingested lap-by-lap data from FastF1 across multiple circuits, engineered features like throttle %, braking %, avg gear, and speed profiles per compound and tire age bucket
...
- XGBoost lap-time predictor: trained on race telemetry with leave-one-out target encoding per track, fuel load effect, and tire degradation curves baked in
...

HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD. This role will support the team in creating and managing end-to-end generative AI solutions. The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.

results.title: Senior, Data Scientist at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
# Senior, Data Scientist
...
Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI
...
Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.
...
- Demonstrated history of strong hands-on experience in AI/ML modeling
...
- Hands-on experience with Generative AI technologies: LLMs, multimodal models, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA)
...
- Prior Experience in building GenAI, DL, Vision-based models.
...
- Strong foundation in classical ML, deep learning, and modern architectures — CNNs, Transformers, and domain-specific variants
...
Mandatory Skills: Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Deep-learning, Python, GenAI Additional Qualifications: Good to have experience in areas such as LLM Optimization.
